goal: Resolve the remaining dirty worktree and commit the reconciled result.
deliverable: One clean commit plus receipts showing how dirty changes were classified, verified, and cleaned.
constraints: Do not reopen the pushed pdfPageRenderer.ts integration
Preserve legitimate fixes that already have coherent code or tests
Delete only transient or clearly superseded artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Dirty source changes are either committed or explicitly reverted
Focused verification passes for the retained source changes
The repository ends with a clean git status
non_goals: New product work outside the dirty files
assumptions: The user wants the current dirty worktree settled now rather than split into multiple future commits
Current untracked runtime outputs from earlier vibe runs are transient unless they are needed as proof for this run
